response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the on-screen text for 'ちゅーりゅ♡' (Chu-ryu) and 'SOS'. 2. No Reference JSON lyrics were provided, so relying primarily on audio transcription and on-screen song titles. 3. Video duration matches the active vocal performance. 4. Subtitles are tightly wrapped to vocal bursts with discrete blocks for pauses.

subtitles.original: ずっと歌ってたら本物さ
subtitles.english: If I keep singing, it'll become the real thing.

subtitles.original: ねえ アイドルになりたい
subtitles.english: Hey, I want to be an idol.

subtitles.original: すごい愛をあげたい
subtitles.english: I want to give you so much love.

subtitles.original: この命の使い方を
subtitles.english: How to use this life...

subtitles.original: 君に愛されていたい
subtitles.english: ...is that I want to be loved by you.

subtitles.original: 好きでいいよ もっと簡単に
subtitles.english: It's okay to love me, more easily.

subtitles.original: 届け優しさ絆
subtitles.english: Reach out, kindness and bonds,

subtitles.original: キラキラ輝け 頑張っていきましょう！
subtitles.english: shine brightly, let's do our best!

subtitles.original: ショイ！
subtitles.english: Sore!

subtitles.original: わあ！ びっくりしたでしょ
subtitles.english: Whoa! You were surprised, weren't you?

subtitles.original: 今日の私が昨日より可愛いなんて
subtitles.english: That I'm even cuter today than I was yesterday.

subtitles.original: ぎゅーちゅぎゅーちゅぎゅってして
subtitles.english: Squeeze, kiss, squeeze, kiss, give me a squeeze.

subtitles.original: 次の流行りは 次の自撮り
subtitles.english: The next trend is the next selfie,

subtitles.original: 困らないようにしっとかなくちゃ
subtitles.english: gotta stay informed so I don't miss out.

subtitles.original: でもぎゅってしたら大爆発
subtitles.english: But if you squeeze me, it's a big explosion!

subtitles.original: 散りたい散りたい知りたくない
subtitles.english: I wanna scatter, I wanna scatter, I don't wanna know.

subtitles.original: 知りたくない ずっと閉じてたら
subtitles.english: I don't wanna know, if I keep them closed forever,

subtitles.original: すべて なぜなぜわからないだらけのコスワンダーランド
subtitles.english: everything is a 'why?' in this 'Cos-Wonderland' of unknowns.

subtitles.original: 私 ちっちっちっちっ ぎゅー私
subtitles.english: Me, chi-chi-chi-chi, squeeze me!

subtitles.original: ちっちっちっちっ ぎゅー私
subtitles.english: Chi-chi-chi-chi, squeeze me!

subtitles.original: ぎゅー！
subtitles.english: Squeeze!

subtitles.original: ここ最年少 未来最年少
subtitles.english: The youngest here, the youngest in the future.

subtitles.original: ここ最大量 未来カステラ
subtitles.english: Maximum amount here, future Castella.

subtitles.original: 未来ちらちら 福袋みたい
subtitles.english: Future flickering, like a lucky bag.

subtitles.original: 好きな色が見えたから これにしよ！
subtitles.english: I saw my favorite color, so I'll pick this one!

subtitles.original: たまとカステラ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Tama and Castella, Yay!

subtitles.original: 移住しないならしちゃうじね
subtitles.english: If you don't move in, I'll just do it.

subtitles.original: 間違っても可愛くなれるじね
subtitles.english: Even if I make a mistake, I can still be cute.

subtitles.original: 一番可愛い時に死にたいなら
subtitles.english: If you want to die when you're at your cutest,

subtitles.original: 全然死なないね
subtitles.english: you'll never die at all.

subtitles.original: 私 ちっちっちっちっ
subtitles.english: Me, chi-chi-chi-chi,

subtitles.original: ぎゅー私 ちっちっちっちっ
subtitles.english: squeeze me, chi-chi-chi-chi.

subtitles.original: 死んでる暇ない可愛さ言いたい
subtitles.english: I want to say, cuteness has no time for dying.

subtitles.original: ここ最年少 未来最年少
subtitles.english: The youngest here, the youngest in the future.

subtitles.original: 今無敵子 未来全部入り
subtitles.english: Invincible girl now, everything in the future.

subtitles.original: 好きな瞳が好きな私で
subtitles.english: With the eyes I love, being the me I love,

subtitles.original: ひたすらすごく素敵な女の子
subtitles.english: I'm just a very wonderful girl,

subtitles.original: なんだもん
subtitles.english: that's what I am.

subtitles.original: 「何歳になっても可愛いね」じゃないの
subtitles.english: It's not 'You're cute no matter how old you get'.

subtitles.original: こっちは努力して可愛いやってんの
subtitles.english: I'm putting in the effort to be cute!

subtitles.original: 何十何歳だったって可愛いの
subtitles.english: I'm cute even if I'm decades old.

subtitles.original: 本当はそんなの当たり前だもん
subtitles.english: In fact, that's just common sense.

subtitles.original: 言わせないでよ そっちから言って
subtitles.english: Don't make me say it, you say it first.

subtitles.original: 「今日も可愛いね」でしょ？
subtitles.english: It's 'You're cute today too,' right?

subtitles.original: 今日も可愛いね！ 今日も可愛いね！
subtitles.english: Cute today too! Cute today too!

subtitles.original: 可愛いね！ 可愛い！
subtitles.english: So cute! Cute!

subtitles.original: 今日も可愛い！ 今日も可愛い！
subtitles.english: Cute today! Cute today!

subtitles.original: 私 今日も可愛いね！
subtitles.english: I'm cute today too, aren't I!

subtitles.original: よし、今日も可愛いぞ！
subtitles.english: Alright, I'm cute today too!

subtitles.original: 未来ちらちら 降りな追い風
subtitles.english: Future flickering, descending tailwind.

subtitles.original: 覗き見しては元に戻して
subtitles.english: Peeking in and then putting it back.

subtitles.original: 未来ちらちら 怖いからこそ
subtitles.english: Future flickering, precisely because it's scary,

subtitles.original: 今を燃やして今日に行きたい
subtitles.english: I want to burn the present and go into today.

subtitles.english: I saw my favorite color, so I'll pick this one!

subtitles.original: たまとカステラ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Tama and Castella, Yay!

subtitles.original: ちゅーぎゅー ちゅーぎゅー
subtitles.english: Chu-gyu, chu-gyu.

subtitles.original: ちゅーぎゅー ぎゅーぎゅー ぎゅーぎゅー
subtitles.english: Chu-gyu, gyu-gyu, gyu-gyu.

subtitles.original: カステラー！
subtitles.english: Castella!

subtitles.original: 君に恋な恋のエスオーエス
subtitles.english: Falling for you, a SOS of love.

subtitles.original: ずっと胸が苦しいです
subtitles.english: My heart has been aching forever.

subtitles.original: 早くレスキュー 好きのテレパシー
subtitles.english: Quick, rescue me with a telepathy of love.

subtitles.original: 早く気づいて
subtitles.english: Please notice me soon.

subtitles.original: 初めて出会った時から
subtitles.english: Since the first time we met,

subtitles.original: ハートが震えてたんだよ
subtitles.english: my heart has been trembling.

subtitles.original: 無意識に意識しちゃう
subtitles.english: I consciously notice you unconsciously.

subtitles.original: この感じはきっと急上昇で
subtitles.english: This feeling is definitely rapidly rising.

subtitles.original: 求め合うだけで顔が熱いの
subtitles.english: Just seeking each other makes my face hot.

subtitles.original: 話しかけられて頭がパニック
subtitles.english: My head panics whenever you talk to me.
